title: Session continuity: persist command history and agent state
desc: FEATURE: persist last N commands, AI query sessions (triad/ask results), and agent states across Eye restarts. Enables 'resume where you left off' without losing context after hot-swap or crash.
steps: Persist last 50 commands to runtime/command_history.jsonl (rolling). Eye reads on start, exposes via 'eye tick' response for context injection.
Persist ask session IDs (Claude conversation IDs, GPT thread IDs) to runtime/ai_sessions.json keyed by session date. Enables resume via 'wkappbot ask claude --resume'.
Agent state (Codex session ID, triad conversation context) to runtime/agent_sessions.jsonl. Eye hot-swap reads these files on restart.
author: claude
